study: Sangram SG-MO-022 (Причастия презенса и перфекта) — non-finite, native + honest caveat

snapshot.provenance_note: pin 04e0778 orphaned; binding = provenance table + SHA-256 + tag c3-pin-04e0778-content

present_participle_native_positive.voice_note: Voice=Pass = passive present participle (-yamāna); Voice=None = active+middle (-ant/-māna) NOT natively split — the active/middle distinction is invisible (EM)

perfect_active_participle_partial_EM2.note: the reduplicated perfect active participle (-vas, vidvān) rides under Tense=Past, whose Part bucket also carries ta-na past forms (EM2-adjacent). The -vas surface filter is a partial/recoverable lower bound; led by vid (vidvān 'learned').

cross_reference.note: ta-na PPP (Tense=None) = SG-MO-023; future participle (Tense=Fut) = noted at SG-MO-021

limits.present_active_middle_not_split: Voice=None conflates active (-ant) and middle (-māna); only passive is tagged
limits.perfect_EM2: perfect active participle not cleanly bucketed (Tense=Past mixes ta-na past forms); -vas count is a lower bound
